# Mokoro SPA v0.1 тАФ Self-Review Notes

## Prepared for CodeRabbit + Macroscope Code Review

## Generated by: Antigravity ┬╖ GStack Workflow ┬╖ Staff Auditor Pass

## Status: OPEN тАФ Awaiting Automated Review

---

## ЁЯФ┤ Critical / Blocking

### 1. Multiple `<h1>` Tags Violating Document Outline

- **Files:** `severed-node-section.tsx` (L22, L26, L30, L34, L38), `bento-section.tsx` (L35)
- **Impact:** Breaks SEO document outline and WCAG 1.3.1 (Info and Relationships)
- **Detail:** Each section uses `<h1>` for visual hierarchy, but `hero-section.tsx` is the authoritative `<h1>`. All secondary section headings must be `<h2>` or `<h3>` semantically while retaining large visual sizing via className.

### 2. Raw `<input>` / `<textarea>` Bypassing shadcn Primitives

- **File:** `comms-section.tsx` (L44тАУ75)
- **Impact:** Breaks design system consistency; violates tech-stack rule prohibiting raw primitive HTML
- **Detail:** Native `<input type="text">`, `<input type="email">`, `<textarea>` are used directly. The project has registered `<Input>` and `<Textarea>` components at `src/components/ui/input.tsx` and `src/components/ui/textarea.tsx`. These must be used instead.

### 3. Form Submission Uses `alert()` тАФ No Real Handler

- **File:** `comms-section.tsx` (L9)
- **Impact:** Zero backend integration; broken UX flow; no toast/notification system
- **Detail:** `alert("Echo transmitted. We will find you.")` is placeholder code. No Supabase edge function, no Resend/email relay, no `sonner` toast. The GStack tech stack mandates Supabase or Convex for all backend interactions.

---

## ЁЯЯб Major / Should Fix

### 4. Hero Background тАФ `maskImage` vs `WebkitMaskImage` Conflict

- **File:** `hero-section.tsx` (L84тАУ106)
- **Impact:** The intended repeating grid mask pattern is invisible in Chrome/Safari
- **Detail:** `maskImage` (standard) uses a multi-layer composited mask with `maskComposite: 'intersect'`. `WebkitMaskImage` (webkit) overrides with only a single radial gradient and `WebkitMaskComposite: 'source-in'`. Since Chrome uses the webkit property, the complex grid+radial intersection is never rendered. Only the plain radial vignette applies. The `maskImage` block is dead code on all current browsers.

### 5. Hardcoded `#001a2c` Breaks the OKLCH Token System

- **File:** `vault-section.tsx` (L46)
- **Impact:** Color will not respond to theme changes; breaks design token integrity
- **Detail:** `bg-[#001a2c]` is a raw hex value. All colors must flow through the OKLCH `@theme` token system defined in `src/index.css`. Introduce `--color-vault-revealed: oklch(0.08 0.03 220)` or map to existing `--background`.

### 6. `ShineBorder` color Prop Uses `hsl(var(--primary))` тАФ OKLCH Incompatibility

- **File:** `vault-section.tsx` (L29)
- **Impact:** Incorrect color rendering; `--primary` is OKLCH, not HSL
- **Detail:** `color={["hsl(var(--primary))", "transparent", "transparent"]}` тАФ wrapping an OKLCH variable in `hsl()` produces undefined/incorrect output. Use `var(--color-primary)` (the Tailwind v4 `@theme` mapped token) directly.

### 7. Header Nav Links Point to Non-Existent Section IDs

- **File:** `header.tsx` (L10тАУ15)
- **Impact:** All navigation links silently do nothing; broken UX
- **Detail:** Nav hrefs: `#nexus-gateway`, `#constellation`, `#pathfinders`, `#protocol`. None of these IDs exist on any rendered section in `App.tsx`. Only `#resonance` (CommsSection) and `#act-iv` (VaultSection) are wired.

### 8. BentoGrid тАФ Missing ARIA Roles and Keyboard Navigation

- **Files:** `bento.tsx`, `bento-section.tsx`
- **Impact:** Not keyboard accessible; fails WCAG 2.1 Level AA
- **Detail:** Grid is purely presentational. No `role="grid"`, no `role="gridcell"`, no `tabIndex` management. The CTA button inside a BentoGridItem may not be reachable in correct tab order.

### 9. Mobile: Primary CTA Hidden Below `sm` Breakpoint

- **File:** `header.tsx` (L67)
- **Impact:** Zero conversion surface on mobile < 640px before hamburger is opened
- **Detail:** `hidden sm:flex` hides "Establish Comms" on all phones narrower than 640px. The mobile dropdown (inside hamburger) contains the CTA, but the initial viewport shows no primary action for mobile users.

---

## ЁЯЯв Minor / Polish

### 10. `"use client"` Directive in a Vite App (Dead Code)

- **Files:** `comms-section.tsx` (L1), `header.tsx` (L1)
- **Detail:** Next.js App Router directive has zero effect in Vite. Creates misleading coupling signals for reviewers.

### 11. `screenshot.js` and `screenshot.png` Committed to Root

- **Detail:** Dev utility script + binary asset committed. PNG bloats Git history with a binary blob. These files should be added to `.gitignore`.

### 12. Default Vite Scaffold Assets Not Removed

- **Files:** `src/assets/react.svg`, `public/vite.svg`
- **Detail:** `react.svg` unreferenced. `vite.svg` is still the active favicon in `index.html` despite `ai-logo.png` existing in `/public`.

### 13. Dead Components Never Wired into App.tsx

- **Files:** `src/components/ethos-section.tsx`, `src/components/timeline.tsx`
- **Detail:** Fully built components that are never imported into `App.tsx`. Either integrate or move to `_drafts/`.

### 14. `tracking-[0.2em]` on `text-7xl` Causes Mid-Breakpoint Overflow

- **File:** `methodology-section.tsx` (L42)
- **Detail:** `text-5xl md:text-7xl tracking-[0.2em]` тАФ extreme tracking on large text causes the "THE VERGENCE PROTOCOL" heading to overflow or wrap awkwardly at 768pxтАУ1024px viewport widths.

---

## Review Checklist

- [ ] Fix `<h1>` semantic violations across severed-node and bento sections
- [ ] Replace raw `<input>`/`<textarea>` with shadcn primitives in CommsSection
- [ ] Align header nav href IDs with rendered section IDs
- [ ] Remove `"use client"` directives (Vite, not Next.js)
- [ ] Resolve hero webkit mask conflict тАФ unify mask strategy
- [ ] Replace `#001a2c` with OKLCH token in vault-section
- [ ] Replace `hsl(var(--primary))` with `var(--color-primary)` in ShineBorder
- [ ] Wire real form submission handler + sonner toast
- [ ] Add ARIA roles to BentoGrid
- [ ] Fix mobile CTA visibility below sm breakpoint
- [ ] Remove screenshot.js + screenshot.png from tracking
- [ ] Delete react.svg, update favicon to ai-logo.png
- [ ] Wire ethos-section.tsx and timeline.tsx or move to _drafts/
- [ ] Fix methodology tracking overflow at md breakpoints
